title: AbbVie Company Overview
text: AbbVie Inc. is a research-based biopharmaceutical company that develops, manufactures, and commercializes medicines worldwide. The company operates across several major therapeutic areas, including immunology, oncology, neuroscience, eye care, aesthetics, and other specialty medicines. Key products include Skyrizi and Rinvoq in immunology, Imbruvica, Venclexta, Elahere, Epkinly, and Emrelis in oncology, Vraylar, Ubrelvy, Qulipta, Vyalev, and Botox Therapeutic in neuroscience, and Botox Cosmetic and Juvederm in aesthetics. AbbVie was created in 2012 after separating from Abbott Laboratories and is headquartered in North Chicago, Illinois. For investment analysis, AbbVie is important because it is transitioning away from reliance on Humira after biosimilar competition while building growth around newer medicines such as Skyrizi and Rinvoq.
